Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.group

Interface FlixelGroupable<T>

Type Parameters:
T - Member type.
All Known Subinterfaces:
FlixelBasicGroupable<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
FlixelBasicGroup, FlixelGroup, FlixelSpriteGroup, FlixelState, FlixelSubState
public interface FlixelGroupable<T>
Group-like containers with a typed member list. This interface is intentionally generic so libGDX projects can use FlixelGroup with any member type without adopting FlixelBasic.

FlixelGDX gameplay code that uses lifecycle flags and FlixelBasic.destroy() should implement FlixelBasicGroupable instead (or use FlixelBasicGroup / FlixelSpriteGroup).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(T member)
    Adds a member to this group.
    void
    clear()
    Removes all members from the group without touching member instances.
    default void
    detach(T member)
    Removes the member from the group without additional teardown.
    default void
    forEachMember(Consumer<T> callback)
    Invokes callback for each non-null member using snapshot iteration.
    default <C> void
    forEachMemberType(Class<C> type, Consumer<C> callback)
    Invokes callback for each member assignable to type.
    default int
    getFirstNullIndex()
    Index of the first null slot in getMembers(), or -1 if none.
    int
    getMaxSize()
    Returns the maximum number of members allowed.
    @Nullable com.badlogic.gdx.utils.SnapshotArray<T>
    getMembers()
    Returns the backing array, or null if the implementation has not allocated it yet (FlixelGroup).
    void
    remove(T member)
    Removes the member from this group only.
    void
    setMaxSize(int maxSize)
    Sets the maximum number of members allowed.

  • Method Details

    • add

      void add(T member)
      Adds a member to this group.

    • remove

      void remove(T member)
      Removes the member from this group only. Does not interpret or tear down the member; see FlixelBasicGroupable for optional destroy semantics on FlixelBasic members.

    • clear

      void clear()
      Removes all members from the group without touching member instances.

    • getMembers

      @Nullable @Nullable com.badlogic.gdx.utils.SnapshotArray<T> getMembers()
      Returns the backing array, or null if the implementation has not allocated it yet (FlixelGroup).

    • getMaxSize

      int getMaxSize()
      Returns the maximum number of members allowed. When 0, the group can grow without limit.

    • setMaxSize

      void setMaxSize(int maxSize)
      Sets the maximum number of members allowed. Values less than 0 are clamped to 0 (unlimited).

    • detach

      default void detach(T member)
      Removes the member from the group without additional teardown.
      Parameters:
      member - The member to remove.

    • getFirstNullIndex

      default int getFirstNullIndex()
      Index of the first null slot in getMembers(), or -1 if none.

    • forEachMember

      default void forEachMember(Consumer<T> callback)
      Invokes callback for each non-null member using snapshot iteration.
      Parameters:
      callback - The callback to call for each member.

    • forEachMemberType

      default <C> void forEachMemberType(Class<C> type, Consumer<C> callback)
      Invokes callback for each member assignable to type.
      Type Parameters:
      C - Member subtype.
      Parameters:
      type - The type to check.
      callback - The callback.
